members.name: ApplyRest
members.summary: Resets the bone to the rest pose. This is equivalent to setting [member Node2D.transform] to [member rest].

members.name: GetAutocalculateLengthAndAngle
members.summary: Returns whether this [Bone2D] is going to autocalculate its length and bone angle using its first [Bone2D] child node, if one exists. If there are no [Bone2D] children, then it cannot autocalculate these values and will print a warning.

members.name: GetBoneAngle
members.summary: Returns the angle of the bone in the [Bone2D]. [b]Note:[/b] This is different from the [Bone2D]'s rotation. The bone's angle is the rotation of the bone shown by the gizmo, which is unaffected by the [Bone2D]'s [member Node2D.transform].

members.name: GetIndexInSkeleton
members.summary: Returns the node's index as part of the entire skeleton. See [Skeleton2D].

members.name: GetLength
members.summary: Returns the length of the bone in the [Bone2D] node.

members.name: GetSkeletonRest
members.summary: Returns the node's [member rest] [Transform2D] if it doesn't have a parent, or its rest pose relative to its parent.

members.name: SetAutocalculateLengthAndAngle
members.summary: When set to [code]true[/code], the [Bone2D] node will attempt to automatically calculate the bone angle and length using the first child [Bone2D] node, if one exists. If none exist, the [Bone2D] cannot automatically calculate these values and will print a warning.

members.name: SetBoneAngle
members.summary: Sets the bone angle for the [Bone2D]. This is typically set to the rotation from the [Bone2D] to a child [Bone2D] node. [b]Note:[/b] This is different from the [Bone2D]'s rotation. The bone's angle is the rotation of the bone shown by the gizmo, which is unaffected by the [Bone2D]'s [member Node2D.transform].

members.name: SetLength
members.summary: Sets the length of the bone in the [Bone2D].

members.name: Rest
members.summary: Rest transform of the bone. You can reset the node's transforms to this value using [method apply_rest].
